title: Fentanyl: MedlinePlus Drug Information
text:
n anxiety depression unusual thinking unusual dreams difficulty falling asleep or staying asleep dry mouth sudden reddening of the face, neck, or upper chest uncontrollable shaking of a part of the body back pain pain, sores, or irritation in the mouth in the area where you placed the medication swelling of the hands, arms, feet, ankles, or lower legs Some side effects can be serious. If you experience any of these symptoms or those mentioned in the IMPORTANT WARNING section, call your doctor immediately or get emergency medical treatment: 
changes in heartbeat agitation, hallucinations (seeing things or hearing voices that do not exist), fever, sweating, confusion, fast heartbeat, shivering, severe muscle stiffness or twitching, loss of coordination,or diarrhea nausea, vomiting, loss of appetite, weakness, or dizziness inability to get or keep an erection irregular menstruation decreased sexual desire seizures rash; hives; itching; hoarseness; difficulty breathing or swallowing; or swelling of the face, mouth, tongue or throat changes in heartbeat chest pain extreme drowsiness Fentanyl may cause other side effects. Call your doctor if you have any unusual problems while using this medication.
If you experience a serious side effect, you or your doctor may send a report to the Food and Drug Administration's (FDA) MedWatch Adverse Event Reporting program online ( https://www.fda
